title: micranthes parvula
intro: Micranthes parvula, also known as the Alpine saxifrage or Small-flowered Saxifrage, is a low-growing, flowering plant species in the Saxifragaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Micranthes parvula include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a popular choice for treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Micranthes parvula include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
